decisions.relationship_evidence: Reconstructs HBV spatiotemporal evolutionary dynamics in BEAST and uses a continuous diffusion model to infer introductions and exports involving Portugal.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to HBV epidemic history and geographic dissemination.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Analyzes multigene sequence data and a median-joining network to characterize worldwide phylogeographic patterns of B. sorokiniana.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to the geographic history of a fungal plant pathogen.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Performs phylogeographic analyses of SARS-CoV-2 genomes to determine the geographic sources and timing of introductions into Burkina Faso.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete genomic application to SARS-CoV-2 introductions and cross-border spread.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses molecular-clock and phylogeographic analyses to date the introduction of H9N2 gene segments into India.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to avian influenza origins and dissemination.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses worldwide phylodynamic and phylogeographic analyses to identify AMV migration links and the geographic structure of isolates.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to global dispersal of a plant virus.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses WGS and phylogenetic analysis to examine mcr-1 transmission; the reference to phylogeographically distinct patterns does not explicitly establish use of a phylogeographic or genomic-diffusion method.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Not an explicit lineage lead for this exact concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: The study explicitly presents a phylogeographic investigation using prospective M. tuberculosis genomic surveillance to resolve spread within and between prisons and cities.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to tuberculosis transmission across prisons and surrounding communities.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Analyzes WNV genomes under phylogeographic and phylodynamic frameworks to resolve interregional circulation and introductions in Italy.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to WNV spread in Italy.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Performs phylogeographic analyses on 2,352 SARS-CoV-2 sequences to identify international import, export, and migration links involving Cyprus.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to SARS-CoV-2 migration and epidemic waves.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses phylogeographic analysis of PPV1 sequences to infer multiple introductions into Africa from Europe and Asia.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to international movement of a swine virus.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses phylogeographic analysis to infer the origin of porcine kobuvirus and its subsequent international and within-China spread.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to porcine kobuvirus geographic history.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Integrates spatially explicit phylogeographic analysis with contact tracing to infer the dispersal direction and long-distance movement of an avian influenza epidemic.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to farm-to-farm avian influenza dispersal.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Combines multilocus, genomic, and network analyses across countries to infer the geographic movement and invasion history of C. liriopes.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete phylogeographic application to an internationally dispersed plant pathogen.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Integrates phylogenomic and phylogeographic analysis to reconstruct plausible intercontinental spread trajectories of mpox virus.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to MPXV emergence and dispersal.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses worldwide genotyping-by-sequencing and population-history analyses to infer geographic origin, lineage movement, and population structure of P. × cambivora.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete phylogeographic application to an invasive plant pathogen.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Directly compares phylogeography-derived connectivity with spatial adjacency and evaluates which better captures population connectivity in outbreak risk models.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit evaluation of the utility of phylogeographic inference as a connectivity proxy.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses phylogeographic analysis alongside phylogenetic and evolutionary analyses to investigate global CVB4 transmission dynamics.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to global coxsackievirus B4 spread.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses asymmetric discrete phylogeographic analysis to identify supported HIV-1 migration events between Ukrainian and Polish regions.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to cross-border HIV-1 A6 transmission.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses simulations and empirical datasets to evaluate sampling-bias effects and mitigation strategies across discrete phylogeographic models.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit benchmark of phylogeographic reconstruction under biased and unbiased sampling.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a Bayesian analysis of the association between geographic origin and phylogeny to infer regional AMV history and ancestral timing.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete phylogeographic application to alfalfa mosaic virus populations.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Conducts a genome-wide phylogeographical study of ticks across 33 US counties to identify spatial genetic clusters and geographic differentiation.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to the vector of Lyme disease.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Quantifies how geographic sampling bias and migration rate affect the accuracy of phylogeographic reconstruction using simulated histories and an Ebolavirus application.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit performance evaluation of phylogeographic reconstruction.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses BEAST phylogeographic analyses to infer intercontinental USUV migration events and dispersal history.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to worldwide and European Usutu virus spread.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a phylodynamic analysis of SARS-CoV-2 genomes to compare phylogeographic spread patterns of Delta and Omicron in Amazonas.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to variant dissemination in Brazil.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reconstructs African dengue evolutionary history with a phylogeographic, time-scaled Bayesian analysis and identifies introductions and source locations.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to DENV-1 and DENV-2 spread in Africa.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses phylogeographic analysis of full lagovirus genomes to infer ancestral relationships and international connections among outbreak strains.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to lagovirus geographic dynamics.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses whole-genome SNP data to describe phylogeographic relationships among Swiss and European F. tularensis isolates.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to tularemia population structure in Switzerland.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies a maximum-likelihood discrete-trait phylogeographic method to large SARS-CoV-2 datasets to date exchange events and estimate geographic spread.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to SARS-CoV-2 movements within France and internationally.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Constructs a phylogeographic network from complete BFDV genomes to characterize geographic connections and strain variability.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to global beak and feather disease virus history.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses phylogeographic analysis to infer the origin, local diversification, and export of the SARS-CoV-2 Mu variant.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to intervariant competition and Mu dissemination.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reports the absence of clear country-specific phylogeographical structure but does not explicitly describe using a phylogeographic or genomic-diffusion method.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Applied genomic-surveillance paper without an explicit lineage lead for this exact concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Models spatiotemporal SARS-CoV-2 flow using phylogenetic sequence-derived regional connectivity and combines phylodynamic and computational methods to identify interventions.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete genomic-diffusion application to regional COVID-19 connectivity.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Performs comparative phylogeographic analyses and discrete-trait inference to reconstruct PRRSV-2 origins and interregional dispersal.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses whole-genome phylogeographic analysis to reconstruct the origins, demography, and global spread of deformed wing viruses.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to vector-associated honey-bee virus dispersal.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Combines phylogeographic analysis with a generalized linear model to relate human mobility and vaccination to SARS-CoV-2 transmission.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to local SARS-CoV-2 spread in South Korea.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses phylogenomic and phylogeographic analysis to characterize the geographic prevalence and ancestry of a hypervirulent M. tuberculosis cluster.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to a clinically important tuberculosis strain cluster.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses whole genomes, ancestral-state reconstruction, and a structured-coalescent model to estimate urban-rural migration of diarrheagenic E. coli.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete phylogeographic application to bacterial movement between Ecuadorian communities.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses phylogeographic analyses to trace the origins and intercontinental spread of mcr-carrying Salmonella ST34 clusters.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to global antimicrobial-resistant Salmonella dissemination.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes sequence types and geographic distributions of Hungarian HAV strains but does not explicitly report a phylogeographic or genomic-diffusion analysis.
decisions.lineage_evidence: No explicit lineage role for the exact concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Investigates CV-A16 phylogeographic characteristics and infers distinct origins, distributions, and transmission centers for circulating clusters.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to CV-A16 spread in Beijing and globally.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses phylodynamic inference and phylogeographic reconstruction to estimate M. bovis outbreak locations, host transitions, and spatial diffusion.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to animal-tuberculosis spread at the wildlife-livestock interface.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Performs worldwide phylogenetic and phylogeographic analyses of A. simplex and identifies Pacific and European geographic populations.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to a zoonotic parasite.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses full-genome phylogeographic network analysis to characterize the geographic and mutational connections among DHAV strains.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to duck hepatitis A virus history.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses geographically distributed population-genetic markers to infer contrasting phylogeographic histories of two malaria-vector mosquito species.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete phylogeographic application to infectious-disease vectors.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Sequences isolates from US histoplasmosis cases to characterize geographic clustering and the phylogeographic structure of H. capsulatum.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete genomic application to the geographic structure of a fungal pathogen.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reviews available bat and lyssavirus phylogeographic data but does not originate, apply, critique, diagnose, correct, or implement the method.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Narrative review without explicit methodological guidance for the exact concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses BEAST-based Bayesian inference and spatiotemporal analysis to compare the geographic origins and histories of Juquitiba virus genome segments.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to hantavirus geographic relationships in Paraguay.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Conducts a genomic assessment with a phylogeographic dimension and identifies international SARS-CoV-2 entry, exit, and migration routes involving Cyprus.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to SARS-CoV-2 migration during Delta and Omicron waves.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses sequence, phylodynamic, and phylogeographic analyses to reconstruct the origin and intercontinental dispersal of Asian CPV-2c.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to canine parvovirus lineage spread.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Studies virulence, resistance, genomes, and long-term prevalence of M. tuberculosis LAM strains, but the abstract does not explicitly describe a phylogeographic or genomic-diffusion analysis.
decisions.lineage_evidence: No explicit lineage role for the exact concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses genome-based phylogenetic reconstruction across hosts, regions, and time periods to characterize the phylogeography of pathogenic Pasteurellaceae lineages.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to pathogens causing pasteurellosis in farmed fish.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses phylogeographic analysis to identify China as a major exporter of goose parvovirus and infer geographic transmission pathways.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to global GPV spread.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Jointly analyzes M. tuberculosis and human Y-chromosome phylogeographic signatures to compare their geographic and evolutionary histories.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete pathogen phylogeographic application within a host-population-history analysis.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses phylogenetic and phylogeographic analyses to reconstruct the origin and intercontinental spread of blaOXA-232-carrying K. pneumoniae ST15.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to global dissemination of carbapenem-resistant K. pneumoniae.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Performs phylogeographic analyses to infer ancestral locations and migration rates of bovine rotavirus G6 lineages in the Americas.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to rotavirus spatiotemporal dynamics.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Directly identifies geographic host-sampling and sequencing biases that limit reliable phylogeographic inference for Lassa virus.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit assessment of data limitations affecting phylogeographic and molecular-epidemiologic inference.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses maximum-likelihood and Bayesian phylogeographic reconstruction, including continuous phylogeography, to infer Tula hantavirus origin and migration.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to TULV dispersal across Eurasia.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Combines molecular dating, phylogeography, and comparative genomics to infer the emergence and international spread of pathogenic S. suis lineages.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to a zoonotic livestock pathogen.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Investigates the phylogeographic spread of Pakistani IBV isolates and infers multiple international introduction events.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to infectious bronchitis virus introductions.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a Bayesian phylogeography framework to infer the geographic origins and introductions of bluetongue virus serotypes in Tunisia.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to BTV emergence and spread.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses MLST and a phylogenetic tree to describe sequence types; it states that phylogeographic analysis could be used but does not explicitly perform such an analysis.
decisions.lineage_evidence: No genuine lineage lead for the exact concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses BEAST to estimate relative migration rates and geographic spread of the HIV-1 CRF01_AE epidemic among Philippine island groups.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses phylogeographic analysis to infer worldwide and within-China migration paths of CVA14.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Establishes high-resolution phylogeographical surveillance using amplicon sequencing and applies phylogenetic analysis to refine an HTNV phylogeographic map.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Provides the EvoLaps web application for visualizing, analyzing, and animating continuous phylogeographic inference results and scenarios.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit software implementation for phylogeographic visualization.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Benchmarks deep-learning and Bayesian likelihood approaches for viral phylogeography, including accuracy, model misspecification, uncertainty, and speed.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit comparative performance evaluation of phylogeographic inference approaches.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses Bayesian phylogeographic inference to trace the Asian S. aureus ST5 MRSA clade to Japan and infer later spread to China and Korea.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops study-specific spatial phylogeographic models to estimate WNV dispersal direction and velocity and relate them to environmental drivers.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses phylogeographic analysis to identify Xinjiang as an important source of EV-C99 epidemics elsewhere in China.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses viral genomes and phylogeographic analyses to infer geographic origins and migration contributions to Omicron establishment on a university campus.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies Bayesian discrete phylogeographic analysis to MLST data to infer B. lusitaniae origins and migration from Europe to North Africa.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to dispersal of a zoonotic tick-borne bacterium.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses discrete phylogeographic modeling to estimate HIV-1 A6 introduction sources and migration events within Poland.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to HIV-1 A6 epidemic spread.

decisions.relationship_evidence: The study applies link prediction based on host phylogenetic distance and geographic overlap, not pathogen phylogeography or genomic-diffusion inference.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses evolutionary and phylogenetic analyses to infer the Eurasian or mixed geographic origins of H13N6 avian-influenza gene segments.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses worldwide phylodynamic and phylogeographic analysis to infer the origin and subsequent intercontinental spread of wheat dwarf virus.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Builds phylogeographic and phylodynamic models of MPXV genomes to estimate introductions, community transmission, and regional spread.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Analyzes geographic genotype prevalence, genetic diversity, ancient DNA, and human migration to infer the origin and dispersal of the M. tuberculosis Haarlem genotype.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Investigates global phylogeographic relationships using WGS and public genomes to identify cross-country clonal transmission of carbapenem-resistant K. aerogenes.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses phylogenetic and phylogeographic analysis to relate Brazilian Marek's disease virus strains to strains from the USA and Japan.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses phylogeographic analysis to reconstruct H9N2 spread among countries and hosts, including transmission from Tunisia to neighboring countries.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to avian influenza geographic and host diffusion.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses genotyping-by-sequencing and coalescent migration analysis to infer the European origin and bidirectional intercontinental movement of P. pseudosyringae.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies a phylogeographic approach to complete RSV genomes and links global RSVA and RSVB spread to air travel.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses phylogeographic and Bayesian phylodynamic analyses of FMDV genomes to reconstruct transmission routes across an Argentine district.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses molecular-clock and phylogeographic analysis to infer multiple introductions and spatiotemporal origins of H5N1 viruses in India.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses 1,956 complete viral genomes to investigate spatiotemporal patterns of HPAI A(H5Nx) diffusion into, out of, and within Europe.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a phylodynamic approach and phylogeographic analysis to reconstruct long-distance avian-reovirus migrations and dispersal history.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses phylogeographic network analysis to identify geographically associated JCV clusters, subclusters, and mutational connections.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses Nextstrain to analyze the phylodynamic and phylogeographic aspects of more than 31,000 SARS-CoV-2 genomes from Türkiye.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses phylogeography and phylodynamics under a global genotyping framework to reconstruct DENV-1 importation, local diffusion, and transmission clusters in China.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses phylogeographic analysis to infer H5N1 transmission into the Americas and map possible entry and spread routes in the Southern Hemisphere.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Provides the open-source spread.gl browser application for visualizing discrete and continuous phylogeographic inference results and pathogen dispersal through time.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Explicitly develops for the first time measures of phylogeographic incompatibility for comparing geographic histories across genomic regions.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses Bayesian phylogeographic analysis to infer the origin, intercity migration, and nationwide diffusion of HIV-1 CRF59_01B.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses Bayesian modeling and phylogeographical analyses to reconstruct the introduction and transmission history of an MPT64-negative M. tuberculosis strain.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Combines georeferenced genomes, environmental data, phylogenetic similarity, and phylodynamics, but does not explicitly describe phylogeographic or genomic-diffusion inference.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses phylogeographical approaches on African and global influenza genomes to infer introductions, regional transfers, exports, and reassortment.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Undertakes phylogeographic analyses of M. caprae genomes to reconstruct demography, host transitions, and local and transnational spread.
